stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Find the altitude of the condensation level, when an air parcel is lifted from MSL to 20 000 ft, given:

Static air temperature at MSL: +20°C
Dew point at MSL: +5°C.
Grey dashed line: constant saturation mixing ratio
Green line: dry adiabatic lapse rate
Magenta line: saturated adiabatic lapse rate
